description: Assisted in food preparation and service during disaster relief operations. Prep work, cooking, plating, and service. WCK's approach — show up with food first, ask questions second — is something I try to bring into every room I work in.

Weekly prep shifts supporting meal production for social service organizations across the District. Knife work, batch cooking, portioning. Also participated in their job training graduation ceremony as a guest mentor.
Organized internal food drives at Capital One, coordinating collection and delivery. Also volunteered at the food bank sorting and packing donations during peak need periods.
Supported weekly community meal service — prep, service, and cleanup. Martha's Table's model of radical welcome is the best operational example of 'building a bigger table' I've seen up close.
